statement: EXAMPLE_PATHWAY_GENE can be tested as a candidate enzyme only after its exact source sequence is resolved. Synthetic worked example; replace for real campaigns.
blocked_output_labels: absent;0 hits;missing from target;no homolog found
required_evidence: Resolved protein or translated CDS sequence, source accession, genome or proteome mapping, and claim audit before any search result is interpreted.
forbidden_overclaims: Do not report absence in a target genome, convergent replacement, product chemistry, or pathway completeness from a missing query sequence.
intake_blocker_policy: Keep Q-EXAMPLE-001 as unresolved_intake_blocked until a curator-approved source sequence is recorded.
notes: Synthetic worked example. Demonstrates the claim-gate policy: a literature claim may exist, but search testing remains blocked until the source sequence is resolved.
